children.heading: Violation
children.label: a Violation
children.text: Whoever violates shall be subject to a civil penalty of not more than $5,000 for each violation.section 13261 of this title

children.heading: Willful violation
children.label: b Willful violation
children.text: Whoever willfully violates shall be fined not more than $10,000 for each violation.section 13261 of this title

children.heading: Knowing and willful violation following prior violation and penalty
children.label: c Knowing and willful violation following prior violation and penalty
children.text: Any person who knowingly and willfully violates after having been subjected to a civil penalty for a prior violation of shall be fined not more than $50,000.section 13261 of this titlesection 13261 of this title
